name: fogus-workflow-mcp
description: Local MCP guard rail for FOGUS workflow decisions and UI scope.

interface.shortDescription: Deterministic workflow checks for FOGUS agent work.
interface.longDescription: Exposes canonical workflow summary, allowed customer and admin actions, transition validation, and UI contracts from the repo's current runtime workflow policy.
defaultPrompt: Summarize the current FOGUS workflow and guard rails.
Validate whether this state transition is in scope.
Tell me which CTAs should render on this customer page.
